name: Void Magic
description: Watch as Nythera grows into her powers!

name: Walk Through Fire
description: See if you can help the Ninjas find the Jewel of the Four Winds!
notes: Badge's art was updated on  July 19th, 2024, replacing its  old appearance. • DemonicDarkwraith for image and other information. • Legendary Ash for requirement correction.

name: Wanderer
description: Find Aria in Wanderland!

name: Water You Doing?
description: Quest for the Water Orb!
notes: Badge's art was updated on  July 27th, 2024, replacing its  old appearance. • DemonicDarkwraith for image and other information. • Niki for correction.

name: Weave With Me!
description: See what lies behind the Equilibrium Gate with Tomix!

name: Weave Without Me!
description: Help Tomix track down the last of the corrupted spirits!

name: Wild Fighter
description: Defeat Wolf and Bear at the Forest Gate!
notes: Badge was retired on  July 19th, 2024.

name: Worthy
description: Unlock the Atealan Armors!
requirements: Unlock any of the Atealan Armors by completing  Milkgrass Arena,  Cosmos or  Mind Chamber.

howToObtain.instruction: Unlock any of the Atealan Armors by completing  Milkgrass Arena,  Cosmos or  Mind Chamber.

name: Wrestling Champion!
description: Beat all the wrestling challengers to become the UDE Wrestling Champion during Hero's Heart Day '13!

name: X-val!
description: Complete Chapter Two of the Frostval Holiday Storybook!
requirements: Completion of  Return to the Yeti Cave!

howToObtain.instruction: Completion of  Return to the Yeti Cave!
